source_jobs.title: Account Executive - Spanish Mid-Market
source_jobs.description:
About Agicap
 
Created in Lyon in 2016 by three French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest growing scale-ups in Europe, with over 8000 customers, 650 employees and fast revenue growth (7x between 2021 and 2024). Agicap is part of the French Tech 120, rewarding the most promising startups in France.
 
Agicap allows Finance teams of Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash, pay their suppliers and get paid. By combining a Treasury Management System, and Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable solutions into a single platform, Agicap aims at becoming the next leading Treasury Management platform for mid-market companies.
 
We have raised €145M since our creation, with prestigious VC funds including AVP, Greenoaks, Partech and BlackFin, with a last round in November 2024.
 
These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly and accelerate our international expansion across the world.
 
We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are constantly looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!
 


About the Account Executive - Mid-Market role:
 
In daily collaboration with the Business Development team: your mission will be to generate new business by acquiring new logos.
As a Mid Market Account Executive at Agicap, you will be responsible for driving sales and expanding our customer base within the mid-market segment. You will play a crucial role in identifying new business opportunities, building relationships with potential clients, and closing deals to achieve your sales targets.

As a Mid Market Account Executive at Agicap, you will be responsible for driving sales and expanding our customer base within the mid-market segment. You will play a crucial role in identifying new business opportunities, building relationships with potential clients, and closing deals to achieve your sales targets.

source_jobs.title: Account Manager - SMB - French Market
source_jobs.description:
Created in Lyon in 2016 by three French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest scale-ups in Europe, with over 8000 customers, 650 employees and fast revenue growth (7x between 2021 and 2024). Agicap is part of the French Tech 120, rewarding the most promising startups in France.
 
Agicap allows Finance teams of Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash, pay their suppliers and get paid. By combining a Treasury Management System, and Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable solutions into a single platform, Agicap aims at becoming the next leading Treasury Management platform for mid-market companies.
 
We have raised €145M since our creation, with prestigious VC funds including AVP, Greenoaks, Partech and BlackFin, with a last round in November 2024.
 
These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly and accelerate our international expansion across the world.
 
We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are constantly looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!
 
 
As an Account Manager, your primary mission is to drive growth and retention on your portfolio.  
 
To achieve this, you focus on 3 pillars : 
 
Trusted advisor posture : 
- Support customer lifecycle as soon as onboarding ends by organizing regular EBRs
- Build 6-12 months retroplannings with clients by coordinating an action plan with other internal teams (CSC, implementation team...)
- Anticipate and resolve frictions
 
Sales process:
- Own the client relationship with a specific focus on sourcing and/or qualifying upsell opportunities (no closing) 
- Handover qualified upsells leads to Expansion Managers
- Anticipate and handle customer renewals
- Handle churn requests
 
Sales excellence:
- Respect and suggest improvement of actual process to boost prioritization and efficiency
- Fill in properly CRM to have the most updated data
- Report regularly on performance 
- Share your expertise and best practices with the team
- Provide qualitative handovers to the teams you are working with to increase quality and speed of action of those teams

source_jobs.title: Account Manager (m/w/d) – SMB Portfolio
source_jobs.description: Du liebst Sales, kommunizierst leidenschaftlich gerne und behältst auch in stürmischen Zeiten einen kühlen Kopf? Dann übernimm die Verantwortung für Dein eigenes SMB-Portfolio und treibe unser Wachstum bei Agicap in Berlin aktiv voran!

source_jobs.title: Customer Solutions Consultant - French Market
source_jobs.description:
Created in Lyon in 2016 by French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest scale-ups in Europe, with over 7000 customers and revenue growth above 100% YoY for the past 3 years. GP Bullhound has ranked us as the next most likely unicorn in Europe.
 
Agicap allows CEOs and Finance teams of SMBs and Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash flow, pay their suppliers and get paid.
Cash is King, and Agicap fundamentally reshapes the way companies manage one of their greatest pain points.
Our ambition is to become the global financial management solution for SMEs and Mid-Market companies worldwide.
 
To help us get there we have raised 3 rounds of fundings so far, totalling $121 million, with prestigious VC funds including Greenoaks, Partech and BlackFin.
 
These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly the team by welcoming new talents and accelerating our international expansion across Europe. We are now over 500 people.
We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are constantly looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!
 
 
Within the Customer Success team, the mission of the Customer Solutions Consultant is to ensure that Agicap delivers the expected added value to our clients when they subscribe to the tool. 
The Customer Solutions Consultant engages with clients right after their training to guarantee them the best experience throughout their customer journey.
 
⭐ Your mission as a Customer Solutions Consultant:
 
You are responsible for:
 
∙ Defining and implementing a tailored activation strategy for each client (resolving complex issues, setting up configurations to meet new needs, etc.).
∙ Ensuring that Agicap creates maximum value for them and realizes their return on investment (ROI).
∙ Maintaining and developing the use of the solution and new features among our clients.
∙ Actively participating in the identification and qualification of upsell opportunities and recommendations.
∙ Helping business leaders manage their companies.
∙ Contributing directly to the development of our product by conveying client feedback to the technical and product teams: you are the voice of the client.
∙ Sharing your expertise and ideas to improve team performance.

About the Role: Expansion Manager (m/f/d)

Working closely with the Customer Success team, your mission is to drive revenue growth within our existing client portfolio. As an Expansion Manager, you are responsible for uncovering new needs within our current customer base and closing deals for additional Agicap modules and services.

source_jobs.title: Finance Operations & Business Analyst
source_jobs.description:
About Agicap
Créée à Lyon en 2016 par trois entrepreneurs français, Agicap est l'une des scale-ups avec la plus forte croissance d’Europe, avec plus de 8 000 clients, 650 employés et une croissance rapide du chiffre d'affaires (multiplié par 7 entre 2021 et 2024). Agicap fait partie du French Tech 120, qui récompense les startups les plus prometteuses de France.
Agicap permet aux directions financières des entreprises de taille intermédiaire de gérer et de prévoir efficacement leur trésorerie, de payer leurs fournisseurs et de se faire payer. En combinant un système de gestion de trésorerie avec des solutions de gestion des comptes fournisseurs et des comptes clients sur une seule plateforme, Agicap ambitionne de devenir la nouvelle référence en matière de gestion de trésorerie pour les entreprises de taille intermédiaire.
Nous avons levé 145 millions d’euros depuis notre création, auprès de fonds de capital-risque prestigieux tels qu’AVP, Greenoaks, Partech et BlackFin, avec un dernier tour en novembre 2024.
Ces ressources supplémentaires alimentent encore davantage notre innovation produit, nous permettant de croître significativement et d’accélérer notre expansion internationale à travers le monde.
Nous sommes convaincus que notre succès réside dans nos équipes passionnées et dévouées, engagées à bâtir une entreprise où chacun peut évoluer et construire sa carrière. Nous sommes constamment à la recherche de nouveaux talents, visant l’excellence et prêts à rejoindre notre aventure ambitieuse !
 


En tant que Finance Operations & Business Analyst, tu rejoindras l’équipe Finance, aujourd’hui composée d'une dizaine de personnes, et tu reporteras à Marina, notre Finance Manager.
 
Ton rôle sera de fiabiliser, analyser et optimiser nos KPIs de top line (GRR, NRR, LTV, MRR, churn…), et piloter la mise en place ainsi que l’amélioration continue de nos process internes (reporting, outils, flux d’information…).
 
 
Tes missions principales : 
 
Analyse et pilotage de la top line
- Suivi, fiabilisation et analyse de la top line (multiples sources de revenu)
- Création et amélioration des reportings pour monitorer la performance client
- Identification des leviers de croissance ou d’optimisation de la base client 
 
Business Partnering
- Traduire les enjeux business en KPIs actionnables
- Être le garant de la qualité et de la fiabilité des données utilisées par les équipes Business
- Participer aux business reviews et aider à la prise de décision via des analyses claires et orientés impacts 
 
Process & outils
- Amélioration continue des process Finance sur l’ensemble de la chaîne de valeur : CRM → MRR → facturation → cash
- Participation à des projets stratégiques comme la mise en place d’un outil CPQ
- Collaboration étroite avec les équipes Data, Produit, Revenue, Business pour garantir l’évolutivité et la fiabilité des outils et process
 
Missions ponctuelles :
- Support métier auprès des équipes Sales, CS, Produit ou Marketing sur la compréhension des KPIs
- Participation aux reportings financiers et à des projets transverses Finance / croissance

source_jobs.title: Implementation Consultant - French Market
source_jobs.description:
Created in Lyon in 2016 by French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest scale-ups in Europe, with over 7000 customers and revenue growth above 100% YoY for the past 3 years. GP Bullhound has ranked us as the next most likely unicorn in Europe.
 
Agicap allows CEOs and Finance teams of SMBs and Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash flow, pay their suppliers and get paid.
Cash is King, and Agicap fundamentally reshapes the way companies manage one of their greatest pain points.
Our ambition is to become the global financial management solution for SMEs and Mid-Market companies worldwide.
 
To help us get there we have raised 3 rounds of fundings so far, totalling $121 million, with prestigious VC funds including Greenoaks, Partech and BlackFin.
 
These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly the team by welcoming new talents and accelerating our international expansion across Europe. We are now over 500 people.
We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are constantly looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!
 
⭐ Your mission:
 
In collaboration with the Sales, Tech, CS, and Product teams, your mission will be to ensure customer satisfaction and experience throughout the entire onboarding phase of new subscribers, from initial setup to their full activation and autonomy on the platform.
 
You will be responsible for:
 
∙ Guiding and training new clients
∙ Managing, developing, and nurturing a portfolio of clients by understanding their industry, challenges, and needs
∙ Cultivating personal relationships on a daily basis with users and decision-makers
∙ Implementing retention strategies to maximize client retention
∙ Ensuring the best possible client experience
∙ Contributing directly to the development of our product by providing client feedback to the technical and product teams, and beta-testing prototypes: you are the voice of the client!
∙ Acting as a key driver of growth through upselling and referrals
∙ Maintaining high satisfaction indicators (NPS/CSAT)
∙ Sharing your expertise and ideas to enhance team performance

Customer Stories

About the Implementation Manager role:
 
Implementation is at the heart of our company. As part of the team, you will represent Agicap to our customers. After comprehensive training in your first months, you become their partner in unlocking the full potential of our Treasury platform to realize their strategic, financial and operational goals. The Implementation team is part of our Customer Success function and works closely with Sales, Account Management and Customer Success Tech.

source_jobs.title: International HRBP
source_jobs.description:
About Agicap
 
Created in Lyon in 2016 by three French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest growing scale-ups in Europe, with over 8000 customers, 650 employees and fast revenue growth (7x between 2021 and 2024). Agicap is part of the French Tech 120, rewarding the most promising startups in France.
 
Agicap allows Finance teams of Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash, pay their suppliers and get paid. By combining a Treasury Management System, and Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable solutions into a single platform, Agicap aims at becoming the next leading Treasury Management platform for mid-market companies.
 
We have raised €145M since our creation, with prestigious VC funds including AVP, Greenoaks, Partech and BlackFin, with a last round in November 2024.
 
These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly and accelerate our international expansion across the world.
 
We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are constantly looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!
 


As our International HRBP, you will be the strategic architect of the employee experience for our dynamic global growth hub in Lisbon, as well as ou emergent countries : UK, Spain and US. You will serve as the dedicated partner for the Sales and Customer Success (Care & CS Tech) populations across Portugal, the UK, the US, and you will have a Sales population in your scope for Germany. Your scope will have a total population that might grow from 100 to 150 people. 
 
Based in our Lisbon office hub, you will act as the "bridge" between local operational needs and our global HR strategy, ensuring that our high-performance culture is translated effectively across different labor laws and business climates. You will be requested to travel in a monthly basis to our different offices in Europe, and potentially to the US office.

source_jobs.title: Junior Sales Development Representative DACH (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Starte Deine Karriere im SaaS/Fintech Sales bei Agicap, einem der am schnellsten wachsenden europäischen Software-Unternehmen, und werde Teil unseres wachsenden DACH-Teams in Düsseldorf.
Als Sales Development Representative baust Du die Grundlage für unsere DACH-Expansion und entwickelst Dich perspektivisch in Richtung Account Executive, Partnerships oder Account Management weiter.
Über uns
Agicap ist eine All-in-One-Plattform für Cashflow-Management, Treasury und Zahlungsprozesse, die bereits von über 8.000 Unternehmen genutzt wird. Seit unserer Gründung 2016 in Lyon sind wir auf 650+ Mitarbeitende gewachsen und zählen zu den am schnellsten wachsenden europäischen Scale-ups.
Mit 185 Mio. $ Funding und einer klaren internationalen Wachstumsstrategie bauen wir unsere Marktführerschaft weiter aus – und suchen ambitionierte Talente, die mit uns wachsen möchten.

About the Partner Sales Manager role:
 We are looking for an ambitious (Senior) Partner Sales Manager for our DACH region to run the strategic partnerships on the DACH market and drive revenue generation through partners. The mission of this role is scale the partner recruitment and partner sales.
You will manage a set of existing Agicap partners and recruit new partners in order to enable the next growth stage of Agicap in Germany, Austria & Switzerland enabling Agicaps growth to a 100M€+ ARR SaaS business.
The role reports to the Head of Partnerships DACH and is working together closely with our DACH Partner Managers.

source_jobs.title: Partnership Manager - French Market
source_jobs.description:
Created in Lyon in 2016 by three French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest scale-ups in Europe, with over 8000 customers, 650 employees and fast revenue growth (7x between 2021 and 2024). Agicap is part of the French Tech 120, rewarding the most promising startups in France.
 
Agicap allows Finance teams of Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash, pay their suppliers and get paid. By combining a Treasury Management System, and Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable solutions into a single platform, Agicap aims at becoming the next leading Treasury Management platform for mid-market companies.
 
We have raised €145M since our creation, with prestigious VC funds including AVP, Greenoaks, Partech and BlackFin, with a last round in November 2024.
 
These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly and accelerate our international expansion across the world.
 
We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are constantly looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!
 
Headcount Growth :
July 2019 : 10
July 2020 : 50
July 2021 : 200
July 2023 : +500
July 2025 : +700
 
 
Reporting to our Head of Sales, you will join the Partnerships France team. As a leader in cash management solutions as well as pre-accounting solutions (dematerialization, debt collection, etc.), Agicap is developing its network of partners, made up of integrators, software publishers, chartered accountants, and consulting firms. These partners proactively seek information and consider collaborating with Agicap.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development - Italy
source_jobs.description:
About Agicap
 
Agicap è la piattaforma leader in Europa per la gestione e la previsione del cash flow aziendale. Fondata a Lione nel 2016, in meno di 10 anni abbiamo costruito una delle soluzioni più adottate nel continente: oltre 8.000 clienti attivi, presenza in più di 10 paesi, 650 persone, e €170M+ raccolti da Greenoaks, Partech e BlackFin, tra i fondi più selettivi al mondo nel B2B SaaS.

Non siamo una startup che cerca ancora il proprio mercato. Non siamo una corporate che si muove lentamente. Siamo esattamente nel mezzo: struttura solida, mercato italiano ancora larghissimo davanti. Il team italiano è nato nel 2021 da zero. Chi era lì dall'inizio ha costruito i processi, i playbook, le metodologie. Oggi quel team è il punto di riferimento per come si fa outbound B2B SaaS in Italia.

source_jobs.description:
About Agicap

Created in Lyon in 2016 by three French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest scale-ups in Europe, with over 8000 customers, 650 employees and fast revenue growth (7x between 2021 and 2024). Agicap is part of the French Tech 120, rewarding the most promising startups in France.

Agicap allows Finance teams of Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash, pay their suppliers and get paid. These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly and accelerate our international expansion across the world.

We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are constantly looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!

Home page
Customer Stories
Our Values


As a Sales Development Intern at AGICAP, your role will be to support the sales team to replicate this success story, develop business and increase profitability for our company in Italy. During this internship, you’ll get to understand whether or not an SDR role in a leading SaaS company might be for you.

• Very sales oriented, your mission involves engaging qualified prospects and generating business opportunities (remotely by phone).
• Understand the basics of how AGICAP - or any cashflow management tool - works.
• Connect every day with CEOs and CFOs, mastering the basics of outbound prospecting and cold calling.
• Work closely with our Senior Sales Leaders, contributing to create new deals.
• Learn how to manage a sales pipeline, distributing effort and prioritising the right accounts.
• Report your performance. You will become familiar with our business and see how we sell and support our customers. Your onboarding (1 month) will give you all the tools you need, together with the opportunity for you to be part of the Agicap tribe.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative - Spanish Market
source_jobs.description:
About Agicap
 
Created in Lyon in 2016 by three French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest growing scale-ups in Europe, with over 8000 customers, 650 employees and fast revenue growth (7x between 2021 and 2024). Agicap is part of the French Tech 120, rewarding the most promising startups in France.
 
Agicap allows Finance teams of Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash, pay their suppliers and get paid. By combining a Treasury Management System, and Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable solutions into a single platform, Agicap aims at becoming the next leading Treasury Management platform for mid-market companies.
 
We have raised €145M since our creation, with prestigious VC funds including AVP, Greenoaks, Partech and BlackFin, with a last round in November 2024.
 
These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly and accelerate our international expansion across the world.
 
We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are constantly looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!
 


**🎯 What you will do :**
 
Our success story is based on a unique customer-centric culture, an innovative product and excellence of our teams.
 
As a Sales Developer at AGICAP, your role will be to replicate this success story and manage operations, develop business and increase profitability for our company in Spain.
 
• Very sales oriented, your mission involves engaging qualified prospects, demoing the AGICAP solution, providing technical assistance and negotiating contracts (remotely by phone).
• Get to be an expert on AGICAP
• Drive rapid growth of lead generation through outbound prospecting
• Identify the pain points of your prospects
• Position and articulate the AGICAP value proposition to SMBs
• Be responsible for the entire sales funnel
• Close new deals
• Be the eyes and ears of AGICAP on the Spanish market - giving valuable feedback to Product team, Sales and Marketing team
• Report your performance
 
You will become familiar with our business and get to know everything about the way we sell and support our customers. Your onboarding (1 month) will be very complete. It will also be an opportunity for you to be part of the Agicap tribe.
 
🎯 Here is the commercial value chain :
1/ Marketing Team : in charge of the prospect lead generation - Outbound lead gen : with growth engineers and growth managers - Online Acquisition : SEO/SEA, paid acquisition, Content Marketing - Product Marketing Management - Communication, Partnerships : press relation, webinars, branding, video production, community management.
2/ SDR qualifies leads every week. During the first phone call, they identify the prospect needs. They do not present the solution but rather understand how the company manages its cash flow monitoring, identifying needs, decision-makers and existing tensions on cash flow. They plan phone call meetings (software demonstrations) with the right decision-maker.
3/ Account Executives take over and demonstrate the software to answer the pain already identified (by phone, without video call). They sell the solution and activate the subscription. Lead qualification is therefore a major issue in our sales practices.
4/ As soon as there is a subscription, the Customer Success team manages the onboarding, the training of new users. The CS team also manages support and account management.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative - UK Market
source_jobs.description:
WHO IS AGICAP?
 
Created in Lyon in 2016 by French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest growing scale-ups in Europe, with over 8000 customers, 550 employees and fast revenue growth (7x between 2021 and 2024). GP Bullhound has ranked us as the next most likely unicorn in Europe.
 
Agicap is part of the FT120, rewarding the most promising startups in France. We have raised €145M since our creation, with prestigious VC funds including AVP, Greenoaks, Partech and BlackFin, with a last round in November 2024. These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly the team by welcoming new talents and accelerating our international expansion across Europe.
 
With our newest addition in Lisbon, opened in April 2023, we aim to build an international hub that represents all our markets. This hub will foster collaboration and innovation among Agicapians, focusing on our key business departments: Sales and Customer Success. We started with 5 employees and aim to grow to nearly 100 Agicapians by 2025. This hub is crucial for leading Agicap's growth journey, and we encourage all Agicapians to share their ideas on how we can make it a success.
 
Agicap allows CEOs and Finance teams of Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash flow. Cash is King, and Agicap fundamentally reshapes the way companies manage one of their greatest pain points - Our innovative platform streamlines supplier payments and enhances cash collection processes, enabling businesses to thrive in a competitive landscape.
 
Our ambition is to become the global financial management solution for Mid-Market companies worldwide.
 
We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!
 
Home page
Customer Stories
Life at Agicap
Our Values
 
Headcount Growth :
July 2019 : 10
July 2020 : ~50
July 2021 : ~200
July 2024 : +500
 
Join Agicap on its path to Unicorn status.
 
 
Your Mission:
Join us as one of the first SDR for the UK market in Lisbon! As a Sales Development Representative (SDR) for our UK Market, your main mission will be to build and manage a pipeline of companies within our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) by working closely with your Account Executive (AE) to generate high-potential opportunities and support your prospects up to the closing stage. You will be responsible for identifying, reaching out to, and engaging strategic contacts (CEOs, CFOs, Treasurers) at medium and large companies (€10-200M in revenue) to help them understand the added value of Agicap.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) - France
source_jobs.description:
Created in Lyon in 2016 by three French entrepreneurs, Agicap is one of the fastest scale-ups in Europe, with over 8000 customers, 650 employees and fast revenue growth (7x between 2021 and 2024). Agicap is part of the French Tech 120, rewarding the most promising startups in France.
 
Agicap allows Finance teams of Mid-Market companies to efficiently manage and forecast their cash, pay their suppliers and get paid. By combining a Treasury Management System, and Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable solutions into a single platform, Agicap aims at becoming the next leading Treasury Management platform for mid-market companies.
 
We have raised €145M since our creation, with prestigious VC funds including AVP, Greenoaks, Partech and BlackFin, with a last round in November 2024.
 
These additional resources further fuel our product innovation, allowing us to grow significantly and accelerate our international expansion across the world.
 
We believe our success comes from our highly passionate and dedicated teams, committed to building a company where people can grow and build their careers. We are constantly looking for great talents, aiming for excellence and ready to join our ambitious adventure!
 
 
Your Mission:
 
As a Mid-Market Sales Development Representative (SDR), your main mission will be to build and manage a pipeline of companies within our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) by working closely with your Account Executive (AE) to generate high-potential opportunities and support your prospects up to the closing stage.
 
You will be responsible for identifying, reaching out to, and engaging strategic contacts (CEOs, CFOs, Treasurers) at medium and large companies (€10-200M in revenue) to help them understand the added value of Agicap.
 
Your Specific Responsibilities:
 
- Targeted and Personalized Prospecting: Identify and reach out to key decision-makers (CFOs, CEOs, Treasurers) via phone, email, and LinkedIn. At Agicap, we value boldness: Cold Calling is an essential part of our strategy, and comfort with phone outreach is crucial.
 
- In-Depth Needs Qualification: Conduct qualification and discovery meetings using the SPICED method to understand your prospect’s challenges, pain points, and impact. Developing strong listening skills is essential at this stage.
 
- Consultative Approach: Showcase Agicap's value through tailored use cases and identify strategic partnership opportunities.
 
- Opportunity Development: Build strong relationships with prospects. At Agicap, SDRs own their pipelines from start to finish, with compensation directly tied to their ability to turn leads into sales. Unlike many other tech companies, our SDRs are involved up to the closing in collaboration with their AE.
 
- Sales Cycle Support: Ensure the quality of projects handed over to the AE and actively participate in strategic meetings.
 
- Monitoring and Reporting: Track performance metrics (e.g., call volume, connections, demos, deals, average deal size, conversion rate) and relay field feedback to optimize our sales strategy.
 
Unlike many other tech companies, the SDR role is highly valued at Agicap, where our top SDRs typically stay in the role for over two years.
 
After 18 months with us, an SDR becomes a fully qualified sales professional who is:
- An expert in cash flow management and business oversight.
- Capable of conducting comprehensive qualification calls with C-level executives (CEOs, CFOs, etc.).
- Autonomous across the entire sales pipeline (from call to closing in partnership with the AE).
- Proactive in sourcing and selecting their own prospecting tools.
- Skilled at handling objections and mastering the art of pitching.
- A proficient user of HubSpot and an advanced sales tool stack.
- Able to analyze their performance through KPI evaluation.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative Internship DACH - 6 Months (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
About Agicap
 
Since our foundation in Lyon in 2016, we have been revolutionizing the liquidity planning market for SMEs across Europe. We enable our clients to strategically manage their cash flow - to stay on top of things, to look ahead and to grow. Being part of AGICAP means enabling every business to grow and helping companies achieve their entrepreneurial goals. 
Through one of the largest FinTech funding rounds of USD 100 million, we have grown from 3 founders to >500 employees. Our office in Berlin was launched in 2020 and continuously expanded to a team of ~80 Agicapians now. But we are just getting started and are looking for team players with an entrepreneurial mindset and the will to make Agicap the No. 1 all-in-one tool for cash flow in Europe.
 
Join Agicap on its path to Unicorn status.
 
As a Sales Development Representative Intern (m/f/d) at AGICAP, you will make a targeted contribution to the profitability of the company. You will drive the operational business and increase our turnover by a) approaching potential new customers, b) setting appointments to demonstrate the AGICAP software and c) guiding interested parties through the entire sales process in cooperation with our Account Executives.  
 
You will receive the expertise you need for this from the AGICAP Sales Team. In 4-6 weeks of onboarding, you will be comprehensively familiarised with the sales and support aspects of our online tool and our work processes. As a trained cash flow expert, you will represent AGICAP externally and expand our business with new customers.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager - Payment
source_jobs.description:
About Agicap

Créée à Lyon en 2016 par trois entrepreneurs français, Agicap est l'une des scale-ups avec la plus forte croissance d’Europe, avec plus de 8 000 clients, 600 employés et une croissance rapide du chiffre d'affaires (multiplié par 7 entre 2021 et 2024). Agicap fait partie du French Tech 120, qui récompense les startups les plus prometteuses de France.

Agicap permet aux directions financières des entreprises de taille intermédiaire de gérer et de prévoir efficacement leur trésorerie, de payer leurs fournisseurs et de se faire payer. En combinant un système de gestion de trésorerie avec des solutions de gestion des comptes fournisseurs et des comptes clients sur une seule plateforme, Agicap ambitionne de devenir la nouvelle référence en matière de gestion de trésorerie pour les entreprises de taille intermédiaire.

Nous avons levé 145 millions d’euros depuis notre création, auprès de fonds de capital-risque prestigieux tels qu’AVP, Greenoaks, Partech et BlackFin, avec un dernier tour en novembre 2024.

Ces ressources supplémentaires alimentent encore davantage notre innovation produit, nous permettant de croître significativement et d’accélérer notre expansion internationale à travers le monde.

Nous sommes convaincus que notre succès réside dans nos équipes passionnées et dévouées, engagées à bâtir une entreprise où chacun peut évoluer et construire sa carrière. Nous sommes constamment à la recherche de nouveaux talents, visant l’excellence et prêts à rejoindre notre aventure ambitieuse !

Home page
Customer Stories
Nos valeurs


Tu es responsable de la stratégie produit de la squad et donc tu auras la responsabilité de nous aider à scale sur la partie Payment. Tu as pour objectif d'aller analyser les besoins utilisateurs en profondeur, faire un benchmark du marché, de définir une roadmap alignée avec les objectifs stratégiques d'Agicap, d'aller négocier avec les banques et de concevoir le futur du paiement chez Agicap sur un scope international. 

Cette Squad est spécialisée sur la partie paiement bancaire, donc son objectif est de permettre à nos clients de pouvoir effectuer des paiements à l'échelle internationale via des protocoles spécifiques que tu dois maîtriser (EBICS, SWIFT, Editran, API Bancaire). 
 
Tu travailleras en étroite collaboration avec les designers, les ingénieurs logiciel et les équipes opérationnelles pour définir et livrer le bon produit.
Tu collaboreras avec toutes les parties prenantes business pour vous aligner sur des objectifs business communs. 

Être Product Manager chez Agicap implique de construire des solutions techniques innovantes pour répondre aux besoins en matière de trésorerie, cash management, debt management, financement des PME et ETI.

notes: Mostly sales and business development roles, with some product and implementation positions. No explicit mention of sponsorship or clearance requirements.
